wampum.purpose: An interactive web application challenging misconceptions about water use and helping individuals visualize and understand the impacts of AI on water resources.
community_values: Show the data and highlight when estimates for water use differ so people can make their own, informed decisions
A comparative approach: contrasting AI water use with other high-impact sources
Cite all sources— every estimate is transparent and traceable
Free and open — no barriers to access
wampum.limitations: This code should not be used for commercial purposes or to misrepresent environmental data.
wampum.legacy_plan: If this project is no longer maintained, the source code remains open-sourced for educational use and adaptation.
